message:
fix: Fix test blockers (runtime archive, scoped vars, sys.float_info)

- Add utils.allocator_helper to runtime archive deps
- Check scoped vars before var_types in isExprUncertain patterns
- Add sys.float_info and sys.hash_info type inference
- Apply scoped var fix to: math.zig, string.zig, list.zig,
  collections.zig, arithmetic.zig

All 7 initial tests now pass: bool, float, unary, int_literal,
longexp, binop, complex

files.patch:
@@ -108,6 +108,7 @@ fn buildRuntimeModuleFlags(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, args: *std.ArrayList([]
 
     // 2. Runtime module with its deps
     for ([_][]const u8{
+        "utils.allocator_helper",
         "utils.hashmap_helper",
         "bigint",
         "gzip",
